ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail URL of the video */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the video was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "video_format" TEXT /* Format of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the video (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the video belongs to */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is a live stream */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score (calculated based on views, likes, and comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES video_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the video */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the video */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the view was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total view count */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total like count */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total comment count */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score (calculated based on views, likes, and comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_videos" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video uploaded by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being moderated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user acting as moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the report was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video where the user is blocked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being blocked */,
  "block_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the block */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the block was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel being subscribed to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the channel */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the video */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
